query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS business_positions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  businessEntityId INT NOT NULL,
  houseId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  department VARCHAR(100),
  description TEXT,
  responsibilities JSON,
  classificationType ENUM('w2_employee', 'w2_officer', '1099_contractor', 'k1_member', 'volunteer', 'board_member') NOT NULL,
  employmentType ENUM('full_time', 'part_time', 'seasonal', 'temporary'),
  exemptionStatus ENUM('exempt', 'non_exempt') DEFAULT 'non_exempt',
  compensationType ENUM('salary', 'hourly', 'commission', 'fee', 'guaranteed_payment', 'profit_share', 'stipend', 'unpaid') NOT NULL,
  salaryAmount DECIMAL(12,2),
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(8,2),
  commissionRate DECIMAL(5,2),
  payFrequency ENUM('weekly', 'biweekly', 'semimonthly', 'monthly', 'per_project') DEFAULT 'biweekly',
  benefitsEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  requiresBackgroundCheck BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  requiresCourseCompletion BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  requiredCourseId INT,
  linkedSimulatorId INT,
  status ENUM('open', 'filled', 'closed') DEFAULT 'open',
  maxHolders INT DEFAULT 1,
  currentHolders INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  exemptionStatus ENUM('exempt', 'non_exempt') DEFAULT 'non_exempt',
  compensationType ENUM('salary', 'hourly', 'commission', 'fee', 'guaranteed_payment', 'profit_share', 'stipend', 'unpaid') NOT NULL,
  salaryAmount DECIMAL(12,2),

  benefitsEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  requiresBackgroundCheck BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  requiresCourseCompletion BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  requiredCourseId INT,
  linkedSimulatorId INT,
  status ENUM('open', 'filled', 'closed') DEFAULT 'open',
  maxHolders INT DEFAULT 1,
  currentHolders INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
